Awesome! Thank you
Courteous and accommodating movers. They were able to move up my slot as I had to leave early.

Technicians talking in s different language during the entire service. They didn’t know how to mount the TV and did not use the manual to mount the TV but looked on YouTube on how to do it. They were impolite and unprofessional.
Excellent quick and efficient.

This was not an easy delivery. The box was very long and over 200 pounds. The 2 gentlemen were able to get it into the basement without a scratch or even rub on the hardwood, the walls or the box itself. They deserve a 6 out of 5 for how they handled a very tough delivery.
Was fast and good quality delivery

very good service

Five star
Excellent. Great service. They called before the delivery to make sure I was home and where I wanted it placed.
They called before arrival and they delivered to the desired room and made the process easy.
The guys were fast, kind and professional.

Thought they would take the plastic off the mattress and take that with them, but they stated that they had to leave that plastic on and once the mattress got bigger, then I would take the plastic off. Not sure why I paid $24.99 for the service as my Grandson and I could have hauled the mattress upstairs and did what they did. Is this really the way your deluxe delivery & unpack is supposed to go?
Very friendly and helpful installers thank you!
The agent opened the box in my living room instead of bringing it upstairs and now we will have trouble bringing it up the stairs!
Great service
When setting up, they skipped user agreement and I can’t use tv.
The 2 deliverymen were efficient and courteous and did a good job.
Delivery man was very polite and friendly and did a great job!
Technicians helped with removing the old TV and setup the new one rather quickly. Very helpful that I tipped them.

I was beyond thrilled it arrived early and a phone call from delivery team was made. They were professional, quick, knowledgeable, answered my questions and overall excellent service! Well worth it highly recommend! Great job
Delivery, unpacking and installation were professional and pleasant.
The technician was very professional, friendly and great! :)

Major kudos to the two guys that delivered this item, they were very professional, and quickly rectified an issue when the box would not fit through the entry way. 100% would not hesitate to use this service again. They were on time and actually called when they got close!
Great job! They showed up on time, were very professional and brought the item to the living room in the basement where we requested it.
The two gentlemen who delivered the treadmill through our basement walkout were excellent. Not an easy job lifting those units.
Good service and polite
Quick and easy delivery and setup of tv.
installed and met my expectations.
Quick and professional
Great service

They were prompt, efficient, friendly and the large item came completely damage free. Great.
This service was delivered to the room instead of installation. They were able to delivered my table to the basement as instructed.
The two guys who delivered this item were excellent. Completely professional and also very pleasant to deal with. Five stars for both of them!
Quick and professional delivery

Good

Have spoken to 13 Amazon representatives trying to get resolution on a purchase I paid an additional fee which was not accomplished by delivery guys who were unwilling and unable to accomplish moving a Ordered on may 22,( delivered to hallway on may 27), TV down a flight of stairs to my family room. It is now 5:40 June 3rd, and still no solution. All Im asking for is the product moved.
The 2 delivery guys were very professional and their determination to get the  heavy product  into the desired location within the home was appreciated !!!

Purchased the deluxe service which was to include  and place it in your desired location if no defects or damage are found . It's currently sitting on the floor as the techs wouldn't put it in place for me and I now need to go beg a neighbour to help me put it in place.

This was supposed to be delivered yesterday, I was waiting in the first floor of the building to help if needed but nobody from Amazon delivery team arrived. Our time was wasted waiting for this delivery to happen.
Delivery time 1 to 3 arrived at 2 Good service
Professional and courteous associates. They delivered my item to my specified location.
Solid work. The two mrn who came were very efficient and polite. No issues..
Excellent delivery, very difficult and they still accommodated.
The two delivery men were professional and quick. They called and texted me prior to arrival and there were no issues with the delivery of a very heavy box to my basement.
all good

The box spring wasn't delivered until 5pm and is still sitting in my porch. It was supposed to be here between 11am and 2pm. I received an email telling me that my order was complete and who did I like the deluxe delivery and unpack service? How would I know, I never got it!!!
Thanks for a job well done, the guys were polite
Everything was perfect 2 delivery guys was very professional and kind
He did a fantastic job!
Good delivery. Right on time

Huge thanks to the delivery team who delivered my TV today! They were extremely polite, professional, and careful. They placed the TV exactly where I wanted it without any issues. Really appreciated their kindness and great customer service. Excellent experience!
professional delivery service

Two guys carried the NordicTrack box (very heavy) down one flight of stair to the basement. Excellent handling of the large box and knowledge and means to make it down the stairs. Extremely happy with the Room of Choice service.
